---
title: "Leonardo Carletto"
subtitle: "Statistics undergraduate · UFLA"
image: "https://github.com/leocarletto.png"
sidebar: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/leocarletto
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leocarletto/
listing:
  - id: latest
    contents: "../projects/*/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    max-items: 6
    image-height: 180px
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, title, description, categories]
---

Statistics undergraduate at **UFLA** (Federal University of Lavras, Brazil),
focused on **data analysis**, **visualization**, and **applied statistics** with R and Quarto.

## Latest projects

::: {#latest}
:::
